name: Rice and Oyster Dressing
recipeIngredient: 10 cups cooked rice in chicken broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large skillet.
2. Add garlic, onions, bell pepper, and celery to the butter. Saute lightly and remove from pan, retaining the butter.
3. Add oysters and saute in remaining butter until edges curl. If oysters are small, they may remain whole; large ones can be chopped after sauteing.
4. Remove oysters and set aside.
5. Wash chicken livers thoroughly. Place in pan with enough water to just cover them. Boil until done, then drain and slice finely.
6. Combine all ingredients except beaten eggs in a large bowl and mix well by hand. Adjust seasonings as needed.
7. Add the six beaten eggs and mix again until well combined.
8. If the mixture is too wet or dry, adjust moisture by draining liquid or adding additional chicken broth.
9. Pour the mixture into a 4-quart casserole. Cover and warm in an oven preheated to 325°F for about 20 minutes. This dish can also be used as stuffing for a turkey weighing around 25 pounds. It serves approximately 15 people.
